title: VIGIL — Global AMR & Infectious Disease Intelligence Platform
description: An AI-driven platform that automatically collects, extracts, classifies, and analyses global antimicrobial-resistance (AMR) and infectious-disease information from open sources (WHO, CDC, ECDC, UKHSA, PubMed, bioRxiv/medRxiv, ClinicalTrials.gov, WHO GHO/GLASS). It provides structured information extraction, a knowledge graph, trend and emerging-signal detection, forecasting, novelty detection, and a validation-first risk framework benchmarked against WHO GLASS resistance data.
